name: py-expensive-mode
title: Py Expensive Mode
author: Temerition
description: An expensive rebalance for Pyanodons: end-game recipe chains (mounts, armors, wind turbines, tanks and chests) and a full Space Extension Mod overhaul with fixed, massively increased costs. SpaceX rebalance based on MadDuck's Py Tweaks by MdStudio5.
